name: seo_geo_claude_skills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the seo_geo_claude_skills capability.

prompts.name: keyword_research
prompts.template: Analyze the following keywords for search volume, competition, and relevancy: {keyword_list}
prompts.use_case: Generating SEO-optimized articles and marketing content

prompts.name: content_writing
prompts.template: Write SEO-optimized content on the topic '{topic}' that aligns with CORE-EEAT and CITE frameworks.
prompts.use_case: Conducting in-depth keyword research for targeted campaigns

prompts.name: technical_audit
prompts.template: Perform a technical SEO audit on the website at: {website_url} and list SEO issues and recommendations.
prompts.use_case: Performing technical SEO audits to identify website issues

prompts.name: rank_tracking
prompts.template: Provide current and historical rankings for the keywords {keyword_list} targeting the region {geographical_data}.
prompts.use_case: Monitoring SEO rank progress for multiple keywords

prompts.name: seo_strategy
prompts.template: Based on the following data: {input_data}, generate SEO strategy recommendations using CORE-EEAT and CITE best practices.
prompts.use_case: Implementing SEO strategies that adhere to expertise, authoritativeness, and trustworthiness
